evals.name: auth-flow-sequence
evals.prompt: Draw me the authentication flow for our login. The user hits the web app, it redirects to our OAuth provider, the user logs in, we get a code back, exchange it for a token, then call the API with the token. Show the back-and-forth.
evals.expected_output: A SEQUENCE diagram (participants + messages over time), not an architecture box diagram. Solid call / dashed return, labeled messages.

evals.name: order-architecture-layered
evals.prompt: I need an architecture diagram of our order service: a React frontend, a .NET API, a Postgres database, and it publishes events to a message queue. Show how the layers fit together.
evals.expected_output: A layered architecture diagram (C4 container-ish): soft-fill labeled layers/zones, rounded component boxes, a cylinder for Postgres, labeled edges. Not a sequence/flow.

evals.name: order-lifecycle-state
evals.prompt: Diagram the lifecycle of an order in our system, from created through paid, shipped, delivered, and also cancelled.
evals.expected_output: A state machine (stateDiagram-v2): states with [*] initial/final, labeled transitions for the events. Not a flowchart or architecture diagram.

evals.name: gcp-github-cicd-cloud
evals.prompt: Make me a deployment diagram with the actual service logos: GitHub Actions builds and pushes our image to Google Artifact Registry, then deploys to Cloud Run, which reads from Cloud SQL and publishes to Pub/Sub.
evals.expected_output: An icon-cloud architecture diagram (D2) with real GCP + GitHub icons, nested container(s), labeled edges. Icons must actually appear (not silently missing).
